raw_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), assigned_to
ORDER BY month, incident_count DESC;
template:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), assigned_to
ORDER BY month, incident_count DESC;

raw_sql:
WITH monthly_totals AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
),
agent_summary AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        MIN(incident_count) AS min_monthly,
        MAX(incident_count) AS max_monthly,
        ROUND(AVG(incident_count), 2) AS avg_monthly,
        SUM(incident_count) AS total_incidents,
        COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS active_months,
        MAX(incident_count) - MIN(incident_count) AS range_growth
    FROM monthly_totals
    GROUP BY assigned_to
)
SELECT *
FROM agent_summary
ORDER BY range_growth DESC;
template:
WITH monthly_totals AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
),
agent_summary AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        MIN(incident_count) AS min_monthly,
        MAX(incident_count) AS max_monthly,
        ROUND(AVG(incident_count), ?n) AS avg_monthly,
        SUM(incident_count) AS total_incidents,
        COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS active_months,
        MAX(incident_count) - MIN(incident_count) AS range_growth
    FROM monthly_totals
    GROUP BY assigned_to
)
SELECT *
FROM agent_summary
ORDER BY range_growth DESC;

raw_sql:
WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        month,
        incident_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY assigned_to ORDER BY month) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY assigned_to) AS total_months
    FROM monthly_counts
),
halves AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / 2 THEN incident_count END), 2) AS first_half_avg,
        ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn > total_months / 2 THEN incident_count END), 2) AS second_half_avg
    FROM ranked
    GROUP BY assigned_to
)
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    first_half_avg,
    second_half_avg,
    ROUND(second_half_avg - first_half_avg, 2) AS delta,
    ROUND(100.0 * (second_half_avg - first_half_avg) / NULLIF(first_half_avg, 0), 1) AS pct_change
FROM halves
ORDER BY pct_change DESC;
template:
WITH monthly_counts AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        month,
        incident_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY assigned_to ORDER BY month) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY assigned_to) AS total_months
    FROM monthly_counts
),
halves AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / ?n THEN incident_count END), ?n) AS first_half_avg,
        ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn > total_months / ?n THEN incident_count END), ?n) AS second_half_avg
    FROM ranked
    GROUP BY assigned_to
)
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    first_half_avg,
    second_half_avg,
    ROUND(second_half_avg - first_half_avg, ?n) AS delta,
    ROUND(?n * (second_half_avg - first_half_avg) / NULLIF(first_half_avg, ?n), ?n) AS pct_change
FROM halves
ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    category,
    priority,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY category, priority, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY category, month;
template:
SELECT
    category,
    priority,
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY category, priority, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY category, month;

raw_sql:
WITH monthly_agent AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600), 2) AS avg_resolution_hours
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
)
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    month,
    incident_count,
    avg_resolution_hours
FROM monthly_agent
ORDER BY assigned_to, month;
template:
WITH monthly_agent AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
)
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    month,
    incident_count,
    avg_resolution_hours
FROM monthly_agent
ORDER BY assigned_to, month;

raw_sql:
WITH monthly_agent AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600) AS avg_resolution_hours
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
)
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    ROUND(CORR(incident_count, avg_resolution_hours)::numeric, 3) AS load_resolution_corr,
    COUNT(*) AS months_observed
FROM monthly_agent
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY load_resolution_corr DESC;
template:
WITH monthly_agent AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
)
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    ROUND(CORR(incident_count, avg_resolution_hours)::numeric, ?n) AS load_resolution_corr,
    COUNT(*) AS months_observed
FROM monthly_agent
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY load_resolution_corr DESC;

raw_sql:
WITH monthly_agent AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600), 2) AS avg_resolution_hours,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT category, ', ') AS categories,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT priority, ', ') AS priorities
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND assigned_to = 'Howard Johnson'
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
)
SELECT
    month,
    incident_count,
    avg_resolution_hours,
    categories,
    priorities
FROM monthly_agent
ORDER BY month;
template:
WITH monthly_agent AS (
    SELECT
        assigned_to,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT category, ?s) AS categories,
        STRING_AGG(DISTINCT priority, ?s) AS priorities
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND assigned_to = ?s
    GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
)
SELECT
    month,
    incident_count,
    avg_resolution_hours,
    categories,
    priorities
FROM monthly_agent
ORDER BY month;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    category,
    priority,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM flag_13
WHERE assigned_to = 'Howard Johnson'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), category, priority
ORDER BY month, cnt DESC;
template:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    category,
    priority,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM flag_13
WHERE assigned_to = ?s
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), category, priority
ORDER BY month, cnt DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS agents_in_group
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), assignment_group
ORDER BY month, incident_count DESC;
template:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS agents_in_group
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), assignment_group
ORDER BY month, incident_count DESC;

raw_sql:
WITH group_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        assignment_group,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS agents_in_group
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY assignment_group, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
),
group_summary AS (
    SELECT
        assignment_group,
        ROUND(AVG(incident_count), 2) AS avg_monthly_incidents,
        ROUND(AVG(agents_in_group), 2) AS avg_agents,
        MIN(incident_count) AS min_incidents,
        MAX(incident_count) AS max_incidents,
        MIN(agents_in_group) AS min_agents,
        MAX(agents_in_group) AS max_agents,
        SUM(incident_count) AS total_incidents,
        COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS active_months
    FROM group_monthly
    GROUP BY assignment_group
)
SELECT
    assignment_group,
    total_incidents,
    active_months,
    avg_monthly_incidents,
    min_incidents,
    max_incidents,
    avg_agents,
    min_agents,
    max_agents,
    ROUND(avg_monthly_incidents / NULLIF(avg_agents, 0), 2) AS avg_load_per_agent
FROM group_summary
ORDER BY total_incidents DESC;
template:
WITH group_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        assignment_group,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS agents_in_group
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY assignment_group, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
),
group_summary AS (
    SELECT
        assignment_group,
        ROUND(AVG(incident_count), ?n) AS avg_monthly_incidents,
        ROUND(AVG(agents_in_group), ?n) AS avg_agents,
        MIN(incident_count) AS min_incidents,
        MAX(incident_count) AS max_incidents,
        MIN(agents_in_group) AS min_agents,
        MAX(agents_in_group) AS max_agents,
        SUM(incident_count) AS total_incidents,
        COUNT(DISTINCT month) AS active_months
    FROM group_monthly
    GROUP BY assignment_group
)
SELECT
    assignment_group,
    total_incidents,
    active_months,
    avg_monthly_incidents,
    min_incidents,
    max_incidents,
    avg_agents,
    min_agents,
    max_agents,
    ROUND(avg_monthly_incidents / NULLIF(avg_agents, ?n), ?n) AS avg_load_per_agent
FROM group_summary
ORDER BY total_incidents DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS opened,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state IN ('Closed', 'Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed_or_resolved,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state NOT IN ('Closed', 'Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS still_open,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state NOT IN ('Closed', 'Resolved') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_still_open
FROM flag_13
WHERE assignment_group IN ('Network', 'Database')
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at), assignment_group
ORDER BY month, assignment_group;
template:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    assignment_group,
    COUNT(*) AS opened,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state IN (?s, ?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS closed_or_resolved,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state NOT IN (?s, ?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS still_open,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state NOT IN (?s, ?s) THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_still_open
FROM flag_13
WHERE assignment_group IN (?s, ?s)
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), assignment_group
ORDER BY month, assignment_group;

raw_sql:
WITH network_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600), 2) AS avg_resolution_hours,
        ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600)::numeric, 2) AS median_resolution_hours
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE assignment_group = 'Network'
      AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
)
SELECT
    month,
    incident_count,
    avg_resolution_hours,
    median_resolution_hours
FROM network_monthly
ORDER BY month;
template:
WITH network_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
        ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours,
        ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS median_resolution_hours
    FROM flag_13
    WHERE assignment_group = ?s
      AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
)
SELECT
    month,
    incident_count,
    avg_resolution_hours,
    median_resolution_hours
FROM network_monthly
ORDER BY month;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600), 2) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_13
WHERE assignment_group = 'Network'
  AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY assigned_to, month;
template:
SELECT
    assigned_to,
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_13
WHERE assignment_group = ?s
  AND closed_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY assigned_to, month;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    caller_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS agents_involved,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS first_incident_month,
    MAX(DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS last_incident_month,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / 3600), 2) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY total_incidents DESC
LIMIT 15;
template:
SELECT
    caller_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    COUNT(DISTINCT assigned_to) AS agents_involved,
    MIN(DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS first_incident_month,
    MAX(DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS last_incident_month,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) / ?n), ?n) AS avg_resolution_hours
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY total_incidents DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    caller_id,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY caller_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY month, incidents DESC;
template:
SELECT
    caller_id,
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents
FROM flag_13
GROUP BY caller_id, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY month, incidents DESC;

raw_sql:
WITH caller_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        caller_id,
        DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incidents,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caller_id ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caller_id) AS total_months
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY caller_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
)
SELECT
    caller_id,
    SUM(incidents) AS total_incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / 2 THEN incidents END), 2) AS first_half_avg,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn > total_months / 2 THEN incidents END), 2) AS second_half_avg,
    ROUND(100.0 * (AVG(CASE WHEN rn > total_months / 2 THEN incidents END) - AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / 2 THEN incidents END))
        / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / 2 THEN incidents END), 0), 1) AS pct_growth
FROM caller_monthly
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY pct_growth DESC;
template:
WITH caller_monthly AS (
    SELECT
        caller_id,
        DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS incidents,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY caller_id ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY caller_id) AS total_months
    FROM flag_13
    GROUP BY caller_id, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
)
SELECT
    caller_id,
    SUM(incidents) AS total_incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / ?n THEN incidents END), ?n) AS first_half_avg,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN rn > total_months / ?n THEN incidents END), ?n) AS second_half_avg,
    ROUND(?n * (AVG(CASE WHEN rn > total_months / ?n THEN incidents END) - AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / ?n THEN incidents END))
        / NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN rn <= total_months / ?n THEN incidents END), ?n), ?n) AS pct_growth
FROM caller_monthly
GROUP BY caller_id
ORDER BY pct_growth DESC;
